subject: [RFC PATCH 36/45] mm: page_alloc: add alloc_flags parameter to __rmqueue_smallest

2026-04-30.patch_summary: This patch adds an 'alloc_flags' parameter to the __rmqueue_smallest function in the Linux kernel's page allocation code. The alloc_flags parameter is passed through to subsequent functions, allowing them to observe and react to allocation flags. This change does not introduce any behavioral changes, as the added parameter is currently ignored within __rmqueue_smallest. The patch is part of a larger series (45 patches) and is intended to facilitate future logic that requires knowledge of allocation flags.
